mapper.sql: select c.id, c.course_name, c.week_day, c.grade_id, c.teacher_id, c.description, coalesce(c.location, '') as location, c.semester_id, c.del_flag, c.create_time, g.grade_name, coalesce(u.nick_name, c.teacher_name) as teacher_name, s.semester_name from cou_course c left join sys_grade g on c.grade_id = g.id left join sys_user u on c.teacher_id = u.user_id left join sys_semester s on c.semester_id = s.id
mapper.insert: insert into cou_course(course_name, week_day, grade_id, teacher_id, teacher_name, description, location, semester_id, create_time) values (#{courseName}, #{weekDay}, #{gradeId}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{description}, #{location}, #{semesterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: update cou_course set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select i.user_id as userId, i.student_no as studentNo, i.real_name as realName, c.class_name as className, s.create_time as createTime from stu_selection s join stu_student_info i on s.student_id = i.user_id and i.del_flag = '0' left join sys_class c on i.class_id = c.id where s.course_id = #{courseId} and s.status = 1 order by s.create_time asc

select c.id as course_id, c.course_name, coalesce(u.nick_name, c.teacher_name) as teacher_name, c.week_day, count(s.id) as selected_count from cou_course c left join stu_selection s on s.course_id = c.id and s.semester_id = #{semesterId} and s.status = 1 left join sys_user u on c.teacher_id = u.user_id where c.semester_id = #{semesterId} and c.del_flag = '0' group by c.id, c.course_name, c.teacher_name, u.nick_name, c.week_day order by selected_count desc limit #{limit}
